[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / atan

# Method: atan()

```ts
atan(value): number;
```

Calculate the arc tangent of a value.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value whose arc tangent should be calculated. |

## Returns

`number`

Angle in radians.
